bird.name: 黑䳍
bird.summary: 黑䳍（学名：Tinamus osgoodi），是䳍形目䳍科的一种鸟类。 特征 黑䳍体重约1285克，翼长约232毫米，嘴峰长约45.6毫米，喙宽度约7.1毫米，喙厚度约7.9毫米，跗蹠长约70.6毫米，尾长约69.7毫米。黑䳍在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在密集的高大的树木组成的森…

locations.name: 安地斯山脈
locations.summary: 安地斯山脈（西班牙語：Cordillera de los Andes；奇楚亞語：Walla Antikuna）是地球陸地上最長的山脈，位於南美洲的西岸，約7,000公里長 (或8,900公里长)，200至700公里寬（最寬的部份在南緯18…

relations.subject: 黑䳍
relations.evidence: herskovitzi Blake, 1953 | range_map = Tinamus osgoodi map.svg }} The black tinamou (Tinamus osgoodi) is a species of ground bird found in humid foothill and montane forest in the Andes of South America

relations.subject: 黑䳍
relations.evidence: herskovitzi Blake, 1953 | range_map = Tinamus osgoodi map.svg }} The black tinamou (Tinamus osgoodi) is a species of ground bird found in humid foothill and montane forest in the Andes of South America
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 黑䳍
relations.evidence: (2004) The black tinamou is threatened by deforestation or loss of habitat caused by human settlement expansion, agricultural expansion, road-building, oil exploration in Peru, and it is hunted for food. Even within reserves, hunting and habitat loss are ongoing
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 黑䳍

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
